jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Delhivery
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhivery. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About Delhivery:
Delhivery is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery!
